user.title: Etrel INCH charger
user.description: Add an Etrel INCH EV charger via Modbus TCP. Enter the charger's IP, Modbus port (default 502), slave/unit ID, a friendly name, and how often Home Assistant should poll it (seconds). Polling must be more frequent than the charger's Modbus monitoring_interval to avoid the watchdog fallback.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the charger. Check the host, port, slave ID, and that Modbus TCP is enabled.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See Home Assistant logs.

init.title: Etrel INCH options
init.description: Adjust how often the charger is polled. Enable writes only after you have confirmed the correct register addresses for your firmware — the current/pause registers shipped with this integration are placeholders.
